title: viola × pluricaulis
intro: Viola × pluricaulis, also known as the hybrid viola or Johnny-jump-up, is a perennial plant that belongs to the violet family (Violaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been shown to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Viola × pluricaulis can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
